case_title: DIZON, DOMINADOR JR. vs. GYM MASTERS, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIZON, DOMINADOR JR. AS TO DEFENDANT GYM MASTERS, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIZON, DOMINADOR JR. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GYM MASTERS, INC. $3,166.27 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,246.27
